deploy.title: Deploy OpenClaw instance
deploy.description: Fill out the configuration and deploy your OpenClaw instance in seconds.

model.label: What model do you want to use?

communication.label: Which channel do you want to use for chatting?

steps.title: How to get your bot token?

step.3: Follow the prompts to name your bot and choose a username.
step.4: BotFather will send you a message with your bot token. Copy the entire token (it looks like a long string of numbers and letters).
step.5: Paste the token in the field below and click Save & Connect.

note.signIn: Sign in to deploy your AI assistant and connect your channels.
note.invalid: Ensure all fields are filled correctly.
note.limited: Price is going up — but not for those who subscribe now

deploy.success: Deployment started. This can take a few moments to complete.

approve.success: Device approved successfully. You can now access dashboard from it.
Channel approved successfully. You can now chat with your assistant there.

error.alreadyExists: You already have an instance deployed. You can't deploy another one for now.
error.notFound: You don't have an instance deployed yet. Please deploy one first.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.subtitle: Your instance is live! Follow the steps below to start using it.
gettingStarted.dismiss: Got it, do not show again

steps.title: Open your instance
steps.description:
Click the button below to open the OpenClaw control panel in a new tab (the link already includes your access key).
Open OpenClaw control panel ↗

steps.title: Wait for the pairing request
steps.description: When you open the panel, you will see "pairing required". This is normal — it is a security layer from OpenClaw. Come back here afterwards.

steps.title: Approve the pairing here
steps.description: A request will appear in the "Pairing" section below this card. Click Approve. If it takes more than 30 seconds, reload the page.

steps.title: Connect your channel (Telegram/Discord/WhatsApp)
steps.description: Open your bot on the chosen channel and send any message. A new pairing request will appear here — approve it too.

steps.title: Done! Your assistant is ready
steps.description: After approving, you can already chat with your AI assistant through your chosen channel.

apiKeys.description: Manage the API keys used by your OpenClaw instance.
apiKeys.success: API Keys updated successfully. The container is being recreated.
apiKeys.error: Failed to update API Keys. Please try again.

communication.dialogDescription: Enter your new bot token from @BotFather. The token will be validated before saving.
communication.error: Failed to update token. Please check and try again.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Manage your subscription and billing details.
billing.required: An active subscription is required to deploy instances.

banner.paymentPending: Payment pending. Your OpenClaw will be shut down in {{days}} day(s).
banner.lastDay: WARNING! Last day to resolve your subscription payment.
banner.overdue: URGENT! Subscription overdue by {{days}} day(s). Your OpenClaw will be shut down today!

ticket.empty: You have no support tickets yet.

categories.autoDescription: These skills work automatically with no configuration needed.

setup.title: Configure Google Workspace (GoG)
setup.step2Desc: Click the button below to authorize with Google. After authorizing, copy the full URL from the return page (which will show a connection error - this is normal).
setup.callbackHint: Paste the full URL from the address bar after authorizing

instructions.2: Create a new project (or use an existing one)
instructions.4: Create an OAuth 2.0 Client ID of type Desktop app
instructions.5: Download the JSON and upload below

skills.exploreDescription: Your agent can install skills directly via chat. Browse the full catalog on ClawHub to discover new capabilities.

bridge.title: Bridge
bridge.description: Connect your PC to your OpenClaw agent.

status.title: Connection Status
status.connectedDesc: Your PC is connected to your OpenClaw agent. All enabled capabilities are active.
status.disconnectedDesc: Your PC is not connected. Download the Bridge app and follow the setup instructions.

token.title: Pairing Token
token.description: Use this token to connect the Bridge app to your OpenClaw instance.
token.rotateConfirm: Are you sure? The current Bridge connection will be disconnected and you will need to reconfigure the app with the new token.
token.rotateSuccess: Token rotated. Please update the Bridge app with the new token.

download.title: Download Bridge App
download.description: Download the Bridge app for your platform to connect your PC to your OpenClaw agent.

capabilities.title: Capabilities
capabilities.description: Control what your OpenClaw agent can do on your PC.
capabilities.browserDesc: Navigate, click, type, and take screenshots in your browser.
capabilities.terminalDesc: Execute commands in your system terminal (requires approval).
capabilities.clipboardDesc: Read and write to your system clipboard.

steps.1: Download the Bridge app for your platform above.
steps.2: Copy your pairing token from the section above.
steps.3: Open the Bridge app and paste your token.
steps.4: The app will connect automatically. You will see the status change to connected.

extension.title: Chrome Extension
extension.description: Install the browser relay extension to enable browser control capabilities.
extension.step3: Enable "Developer mode" and click "Load unpacked". Select the directory shown by:
extension.step4: Pin the extension. Click it on any tab to let the agent control that tab.
extension.tokenNote: In the extension Options, set your pairing token (same token as above).
